title: The Bitcoin Journey
goal: Discover Bitcoin fundamentals, including its monetary value proposition, miners, transactions, and wallets.

title: Getting your first bitcoins
goal: Learn how to acquire, store, and use your first bitcoins safely.

title: Setting up your first Bitcoin node
goal: Run your own Bitcoin full node and verify the chain independently.

title: Privacy on Bitcoin
goal: Understand Bitcoin's transparency and learn practical privacy techniques.

title: Lightning Network Theory
goal: Understand how the Lightning Network enables fast, low-fee Bitcoin payments.

title: Set up Your First Lightning Node
goal: Deploy and operate a Lightning node for real-world payments.

title: Bitcoin Wallet Architecture
goal: Deep dive into how Bitcoin wallets work under the hood.

title: The History of Bitcoin's Creation
goal: Explore the origins and slow emergence of Bitcoin and its early community.

title: Update Your Online Security
goal: Practical digital security fundamentals for Bitcoiners and cypherpunks.
